token.title: Grab Food — Access Token
token.description:
Paste your Grab access token below. You can get it from either source:

**Browser (Chrome/Firefox):**
Open food.grab.com → log in → press F12 → Application → Local Storage → `https://food.grab.com` → copy `access_token`.

**Android (HTTPCanary / Charles / mitmproxy):**
Open the Grab app → intercept any request → copy the value after `Authorization: Bearer ` in the request headers.

The token is a long string starting with `eyJ…`.

data.refresh_token: Refresh token (optional — leave blank if not available)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Grab servers. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_token: The token was rejected by Grab. Make sure you copied the full token value (starting with eyJ…) with no extra spaces.

abort.already_configured: This Grab account is already configured.
